free_text: Measurement of secondary neutron emission
double-differential cross sections for 9Be induced by
21.65+-0.07 MeV neutrons
The experiment were measured and
analyzed at China Institute of Atomic Energy (CIAE).
Main reference
Preliminary results
Same data given.
The measured raw TOF spectra are
included gas-in(sample-in/sample-out) and gas-
out(sample-in/sample-out). The net TOF spectra are
determined by gas-in/gas-out, and including the
propagation of uncertainties. The flight paths for 3
main detectors are 612.6, 663.2 and 521.0 cm,
respectively. The flight path of monitor is around
600.0 cm, and set at 60 degree.
The 13MV HI-13 Tandem Accelerator in
China Institute of Atomic Energy (CIAE).
Three main detectors BC501A 12.70 x 5.08 cm in
diameter and height with 470 keVee (electronic
energy) electron threshold, and one stilbene monitor
3.0 x 3.0 cm in diameter and height with 300 keVee
were used. The uncertainty of scattering angle is
less than 0.5 degree.
For reduction of the experimental data, a detailed
Monte Carlo simulation was employed to obtain TOF
spectra, which were compared with the experimental
TOF spectra. The corrections due to the finite
sample size effects, flux attenuation and multiple
scattering, etc., were made with Monte Carlo
simulation.
Tritium gas target contains tritium gas chamber
and helium gas chamber,  and more detailed
informations are as following:
(1)Tritium gas chamber: 30 x 10 mm in length and
diameter, the thickness of  gold backing is 0.5 mm,
the thickness of entrance Mo  foil is 10 um. The gas
pressure is 2.1 MPa.
(2)Helium gas chamber: 20 x 10 mm in length and
diameter, the thickness of  entrance Mo foil is 10
um. the gas pressure is 0.3 MPa.
Beryllium: height=40 mm; inner diameter=10 mm;
outer diameter=25 mm;  net weight=30.193 g;
Polyethylene: height=40 mm; diameter=25 mm; net
weight=18.30 g; purify=100%;
The total uncertainty;
The uncertainty of neutron detection
efficiency is (3%);
The uncertainty of the correction for
multiple scattering is (5%);
The counting statistical uncertainty;
n-p monitor cross section (1%)
Data were received from author and
approved by author;
Compiled by Guochang CHEN (CNDC)
Add ND2010 conference publication
reference information by Guochang CHEN (CNDC)
Add NIM paper as main reference and
change the incident energy uncertainty by Guochang
CHEN (CNDC). Also major revision in 003.
Elastic peak in the measured TOF spectra contains
the 1st and 2nd inelastic scattering of Be-9
By Guochang CHEN (2016-12-01):
In the data analysis process, the elastic peak is
excluded for continuum part.
